channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Mark Hoppus Says Violent Soho Are Getting Back Together
item.description: 🎸 Pump up the volume! @markhoppus spills the beans on a @violentsoho reunion. Let's rock 'n roll! 🤘 #MusicNews #ReunionVibes

item.title: Tokischa Shaves Her Head Live on Stage at New York’s Madison Square Garden
item.description: 🔥 Tokischa embraces bold new look with epic on-stage head shave at MSG! Rocking the bald vibe! 💇‍♀️🎤 #hairtodaygonetomorrow

item.title: Interpol Debut New Song “See Out Loud” at São Paulo Concert: Watch
item.description: 🎶 Interpol unleashes fresh vibes with “See Out Loud” live in São Paulo! Tune in for the ultimate groove. 🚀 #Interpol #NewMusic

item.title: Jarvis Cocker, Beth Orton, Anna Calvi, Rufus Wainwright, & More Play Marianne Faithfull Tribute Concert
item.description: 🎶 Legends unite for a special tribute concert honoring Marianne Faithfull! 🌟 Who else is excited for this epic lineup? 🙌 #MusicLegends #TributeConcert

item.title: BTS’ Comeback Concert Draws Record-Breaking Audience in Seoul
item.description: 🔥ARMY unite! BTS’ epic comeback concert in Seoul sets the stage on fire!🌟💜 #BTS #RecordBreaker #LegendsBorn
